channel.title: [Resources] Static vs Server Rendering
channel.description:
The guys from Navi have a great article outlining the differences between **Static Page Rendering** and **Server Side Rendering**.
I like the idea of calling them **Static Rendering** and **Server Rendering** (and **Client Rendering**!). The fewer words the better. We should do the same :slight_smile:
https://frontarm.com/james-k-nelson/static-vs-server-rendering/

item.title: [Resources] Static vs Server Rendering
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
The guys from Navi have a great article outlining the differences between Static Page Rendering and Server Side Rendering.

I like the idea of calling them Static Rendering and Server Rendering (and Client Rendering!). The fewer words the better. We should do the same

Frontend Armory

Static vs. Server Rendering

Static rendering and server rendering both involve rendering HTML for each of your app's pages – but there's one major difference between them...

Read full topic
